semantic.role: Domain logic and core entity definitions
responsibilities: Housing business logic that is independent of external frameworks or infrastructure
Defining foundational data structures and interfaces used across the application
Ensuring domain invariants are maintained regardless of data access approach

English.purpose: This document defines the purpose and boundaries of the `src/domain` folder within the ArchSpine project. It establishes that this folder is the exclusive home for pure business logic and core domain entities, free from external framework or infrastructure dependencies.
English.context_and_audience: This document is intended for all developers contributing to the ArchSpine project, particularly those responsible for defining business rules, data structures, and ensuring domain integrity. It serves as a architectural guideline to maintain separation of concerns.
key_takeaways: The domain folder contains only business logic and core entities.
Domain logic must remain independent of frameworks and infrastructure.
Domain invariants must be preserved regardless of how data is accessed.

Simplified Chinese.purpose: 本文档定义了 ArchSpine 项目中 `src/domain` 文件夹的用途和边界。它明确指出该文件夹是纯业务逻辑和核心领域实体的专属存放位置，与外部框架或基础设施无关。
Simplified Chinese.context_and_audience: 本文档面向所有参与 ArchSpine 项目的开发者，特别是负责定义业务规则、数据结构以及确保领域完整性的开发者。它作为一项架构指南，帮助维护关注点分离原则。
key_takeaways: 领域文件夹仅包含业务逻辑和核心实体。
领域逻辑必须保持独立，不依赖框架和基础设施。
无论采用何种数据访问方式，领域不变量都必须得到维护。
